weka.associations.spade

Class IdList

  • java.lang.Object
    • weka.associations.spade.IdList
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class IdList
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Represents a vertical ID-List used by the SPADE algorithm. Each entry is a pair (SID, EID) where SID is the sequence ID and EID is the event/timestamp ID within that sequence. The ID-List is the core data structure that enables SPADE's efficient temporal join operations.
    Author:
    Weka SPADE Implementation
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      IdList()
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addEntry(int sid, int eid)
      Adds a (SID, EID) pair to this ID-List.
      IdList equalityJoin(IdList other)
      Performs a temporal join for creating sequences where two items appear in the SAME event (itemset extension).
      int getEid(int index)
      Returns the EID at the given index.
      int getSid(int index)
      Returns the SID at the given index.
      int getSupport()
      Returns the support of this ID-List, defined as the number of distinct SID values.
      int size()
      Returns the number of entries in this ID-List.
      IdList temporalJoin(IdList other)
      Performs a temporal join for creating sequences where the second item appears AFTER the first item (sequence extension).
      String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this ID-List.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • IdList

        public IdList()
        Constructor. Creates an empty ID-List.

    • Method Detail

      • addEntry

        public void addEntry(int sid,
                     int eid)
        Adds a (SID, EID) pair to this ID-List.
        Parameters:
        sid - the sequence ID
        eid - the event ID (timestamp within the sequence)

      • size

        public int size()
        Returns the number of entries in this ID-List.
        Returns:
        the size of the ID-List

      • getSid

        public int getSid(int index)
        Returns the SID at the given index.
        Parameters:
        index - the index
        Returns:
        the SID value

      • getEid

        public int getEid(int index)
        Returns the EID at the given index.
        Parameters:
        index - the index
        Returns:
        the EID value

      • getSupport

        public int getSupport()
        Returns the support of this ID-List, defined as the number of distinct SID values.
        Returns:
        the number of distinct sequences containing this pattern

      • equalityJoin

        public IdList equalityJoin(IdList other)
        Performs a temporal join for creating sequences where two items appear in the SAME event (itemset extension). Result contains (SID, EID) pairs where both items occur at the same SID and same EID.
        Parameters:
        other - the other ID-List to join with
        Returns:
        the resulting ID-List after equality join

      • temporalJoin

        public IdList temporalJoin(IdList other)
        Performs a temporal join for creating sequences where the second item appears AFTER the first item (sequence extension). Result contains (SID, EID) pairs from 'other' where sid matches and other's eid > this eid.
        Parameters:
        other - the other ID-List to join with
        Returns:
        the resulting ID-List after temporal join

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Returns a string representation of this ID-List.
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
        Returns:
        the string representation
